parents.subject: LU-13731 llite: include linux/mm_types.h for VM_FAULT_RETRY

commit.subject: LU-000 tests: SSK for master
commit.message:
LU-000 tests: SSK for master

SSK for master.
Disable HAVE_CACHE_DETAIL_WRITERS to see if it fixes el7.8.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly env=SHARED_KEY=true,SK_SKIPFIRST=false,ONLY=0 mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 osscount=2 ostcount=8 testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I9b89f5a61a76573793b60244825fb1bfb3034db5
